Metadata.title: Premium Dealership | Veloce
Metadata.description: Curated selection of performance and luxury vehicles. Inspected with precision, presented with total transparency.

Footer.tagline: Premium pre-owned vehicles. Curated for the driver. Presented with transparency.

HeroSection.body: A boutique showroom for performance and luxury vehicles, edited with the discipline of an atelier. Every listing is inspected, photographed, and presented with calm precision.

FeaturedVehicles.errorTitle: The live showroom is warming back up.
FeaturedVehicles.errorBody: Inventory data could not be loaded from the local API feed. Once the backend responds again, this section will repopulate automatically.

InventoryCTA.heading: There are more where those came from.
InventoryCTA.body: Every vehicle inspected. Every price transparent.

HowItWorks.heading: Simple. Transparent. Yours.
HowItWorks.step1Body: Explore our curated inventory online or in-person. Detailed specs, high-res galleries, and honest condition reports.
HowItWorks.step2Body: Secure your chosen vehicle with a fully refundable deposit. Schedule a comprehensive test drive at your convenience.
HowItWorks.step3Body: Tailored finance packages and seamless handover process. Drive away with complete confidence and peace of mind.

ReserveCTA.reserveHeading: Secure your vehicle before it leaves the floor.
ReserveCTA.showroomHeading: Experience it in person with a private walkthrough.

VehicleGrid.errorBody: The frontend is pointed at the local API, but that feed did not answer successfully. Bring the backend back up and this grid will hydrate automatically.
VehicleGrid.emptyBody: Seed inventory into Frappe or publish a vehicle from the API to populate this showroom.
VehicleGrid.syncStatus: Live showroom sync: {count} vehicles ready to inspect.
VehicleGrid.openCard: Open any card for harmonized Veloce details.

EnquiryModal.heading: Reserve Your Interest
EnquiryModal.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your requirements or preferred appointment time…
EnquiryModal.disclaimer: Your information is treated with absolute discretion.
EnquiryModal.successBody: Our team will contact you shortly.
